title: Responsive Sidebar Nav

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Sidebar Nav
Create a responsive sidebar navigation system that adapts to different screen sizes.
### Requirements
1. The sidebar should be visible on screens with a minimum width of 768px.
2. On screens with a minimum width of 768px, the sidebar should stick to the left side of the screen.
3. On smaller screens (less than 768px), the sidebar should be hidden and a hamburger menu icon should be displayed.
4. When the user clicks on the hamburger menu icon, the sidebar should slide out and become visible.
5. The sidebar should be responsive to different screen sizes and devices.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Do not use any external libraries or scripts.
The sidebar should be fully responsive and work on different screen sizes and devices.

Sidebar sticks to the left side of the screen on screens with a minimum width of 768px.

Hamburger menu icon toggles the sidebar on and off.
Sidebar is fully responsive and works on different screen sizes and devices.
